landing.heroDescription: Professional 24/7 emergency medical response for English and Spanish-speaking expats. One press of a button connects you to our bilingual response team.
landing.whyChooseDesc: We understand the unique needs of expats living in Spain. Our service is designed specifically for you.
landing.feature24_7Desc: Round-the-clock monitoring with immediate response to all alerts, day or night.
landing.featureBilingualDesc: Fluent English and Spanish operators who can communicate with you and local services.
landing.featureGpsDesc: Automatic location sharing ensures help finds you quickly, wherever you are.
landing.featureMedicalDesc: Your medical information is instantly available to responders for better care.
landing.pricingDesc: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include 24/7 monitoring and bilingual support.
landing.pricesIncludeIva: All prices include IVA. One-time registration fee: €59.99
landing.forTwoPeople: For two people in the same household
landing.withoutPendant: Without a pendant, you can still call our 24/7 emergency line from your phone, but you won't have GPS tracking, fall detection, or SOS button features.
landing.testimonialQuote: When my husband had a fall, ICE Alarm had help to us within minutes. The operator spoke perfect English and stayed on the line until the ambulance arrived. We couldn't live without them.
landing.readyToJoin: Ready to Join Thousands of Protected Families?
landing.readyToJoinDesc: Start your protection today. No contracts, no hassle, just peace of mind.

testimonials.title: What Our Members Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of families across Spain
testimonials.quote1: The peace of mind this service gives our family is priceless. When Mum had a fall last month, help arrived within minutes. I can't recommend ICE Alarm enough.
testimonials.quote2: Living alone at 78, I was worried about emergencies. The GPS pendant gives me independence while keeping my children reassured. The bilingual support is excellent.
testimonials.quote3: After my husband's stroke, we needed reliable emergency support. ICE Alarm responded in under 30 seconds during a real emergency. They truly saved his life.

testPendant.question: How do I test my pendant?
testPendant.answer: Press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds. Our team will answer and confirm your device is working correctly. We recommend testing your pendant once a month.

sosButton.question: What happens when I press the SOS button?
sosButton.answer: When you press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds, an alert is sent to our 24/7 monitoring center. A trained operator will immediately speak to you through your pendant and coordinate any necessary assistance.

fallDetection.question: How does fall detection work?
fallDetection.answer: Your pendant contains sensors that can detect sudden movements consistent with a fall. If a fall is detected, an automatic alert is sent to our team. We'll call through your pendant to check on you, and if there's no response, we'll follow your emergency protocol.

geoFencing.question: What is geo-fencing?
geoFencing.answer: Geo-fencing creates a virtual boundary around a location (like your home). If you travel outside this boundary, an alert can be sent to designated contacts. This is useful for added peace of mind for you and your family.

updateMedical.question: How do I update my medical information?
updateMedical.answer: Go to the 'Medical Info' section in your dashboard. Click 'Request Update' and describe the changes you'd like to make. Our team will review and update your records within 24-48 hours.

addContacts.question: How do I add emergency contacts?
addContacts.answer: Go to 'Emergency Contacts' in your dashboard. You can add up to 3 emergency contacts. These are the people we'll call if we can't reach you during an emergency.

updatePayment.question: How do I update my payment method?
updatePayment.answer: Go to 'Subscription & Billing' in your dashboard. Click 'Update' next to your payment method to securely update your card details.

lostPendant.question: What if my pendant is lost or damaged?
lostPendant.answer: Contact us immediately! We can disable your old pendant and send you a replacement. There may be a replacement fee depending on the circumstances. Call us or use the contact form below.

upgradePlan.question: Can I upgrade from Single to Couple membership?
upgradePlan.answer: Yes! Contact our support team and we'll help you upgrade your membership. The prorated difference will be charged to your payment method on file.

hero.title: Your Lifeline in Spain
hero.subtitle: The ICE Alarm GPS Personal Pendant gives you and your loved ones peace of mind, wherever you are in Spain.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting help has never been easier. Just three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: One press is all it takes to alert our call centre. The button is large and easy to press, even in an emergency.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our bilingual team responds 24/7/365 to help. We'll speak to you through the pendant to assess the situation.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We coordinate with emergency services and your family. Your GPS location helps us send help directly to you.

features.title: Pendant Features
features.subtitle: The ICE Alarm pendant is packed with life-saving technology.

gps.title: GPS Location Tracking
gps.description: When you press the SOS button, your exact location is instantly sent to our call centre. No need to explain where you are - we already know and can send help directly to you.
gps.bullet1: Works anywhere in Spain with mobile coverage
gps.bullet2: Accurate to within a few meters
gps.bullet3: Location shared with emergency services when needed

voice.title: Two-Way Voice Communication
voice.description: Speak directly with our team through the pendant's built-in speaker and microphone. No phone needed - just press and talk.
voice.bullet2: Loud speaker for those hard of hearing

fall.title: Automatic Fall Detection
fall.description: Built-in sensors detect when you've fallen and automatically alert our call centre - even if you can't press the button.
fall.bullet2: Alert sent even if you're unconscious
fall.bullet3: Peace of mind for you and your family

geofence.title: Geo-Fencing Alerts
geofence.description: Set up a safe zone around your home. If the pendant leaves this area, we're notified immediately. Perfect for peace of mind.

battery.title: Long Battery Life
battery.description: The pendant lasts for days on a single charge. We monitor battery levels and alert you when it's time to recharge.
battery.bullet2: Low battery alerts sent to you and our team

comparison.title: Choose Your Service
comparison.subtitle: Both options include our 24/7 bilingual call centre support.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All prices include IVA. No hidden fees.

testimonials.title: What Our Members Say
testimonials.quote1: ICE Alarm gave me back my independence. I feel safe knowing help is just one button press away.
testimonials.quote2: When my father fell, the pendant automatically called for help. The team was amazing and spoke to him in English. They saved his life.
testimonials.quote3: The peace of mind this gives our family is priceless. Mum can live independently knowing we'll be called if anything happens.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I use the pendant?
faq.a1: Simply press and hold the SOS button for 3 seconds. Our call centre will answer and speak to you through the pendant.
faq.q2: Does it work everywhere in Spain?
faq.a2: Yes! The pendant works anywhere with mobile phone coverage across Spain.
faq.q3: What happens if I fall and can't press the button?
faq.a3: The pendant has automatic fall detection. If it detects a fall, it will alert our call centre even if you don't press the button.
faq.q4: Can I speak English with your call centre?
faq.a4: Absolutely! All our operators speak both English and Spanish fluently.
faq.q5: What if I don't want a pendant?
faq.a5: You can join with just a membership and use your phone to call us. However, you won't have GPS tracking, fall detection, or the SOS button features.
faq.q6: How long does the battery last?
faq.a6: Up to 5 days on standby. We monitor battery levels and will alert you when it needs charging.
faq.a7: No long-term contracts! You can cancel anytime. We offer monthly and annual billing options.
